channel.title: Bartica Hospital on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Bartica Hospital on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Ramesh is encouraged by the GDF's heroic terrain navigation, heartened by another hospital sod-turning, and notes that the Harpy Eagles begin their title defence today.

item.title: The Guyana Daily Brief — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: GDF closes in on ASL crash site after 24 hours of brutal terrain, Kaieteur blows open the Wales GTE contract, a new hospital breaks ground in Bartica, and the opposition has drama of its own.
